headline: Zacks.com featured highlights include Dow, Valero Energy, Ultrapar Participacoes and Nexa Resources
summary: DOW, VLO, UGP and NEXA are highlighted as PEG-driven GARP stocks combining discounted valuations with strong growth potential.
